hits.title: style-guide
hits.body: Tone: intimate, sensory, direct. Avoid purple exposition. Prefer concrete objects and subtext.

args.body:
SCENE BRIEF: Stormlit Apartment
TONE: Intimate, sensory, subtext-driven (per Style Guide).
SETTING: Mid-century apartment. Heavy rain against windowpanes. Low amber lamp light vs. cool blue lightning flashes.
CHARACTERS: [Character A] & [Character B].
ACTION: Slow, tension-filled proximity. Focus on micro-gestures (a hand brushing a sleeve, shared breath, eye contact).
SOUNDSCAPE: Low rumble of thunder, rhythmic rain, muffled city sounds.
VISUAL KEY: High contrast shadows, moisture on glass, soft focus on skin textures.
NOTE: Keep it non-explicit; focus on the 'almost' and the tension of the atmosphere.
args.title: Creative Brief: Stormlit Apartment Scene

final:
I have searched your notes for the style guide and identified the tone requirements (intimate, sensory, direct). I then created and saved a production-ready creative brief for the "Stormlit Apartment" scene.

**Summary of actions:**
1. **Searched notes** for "style guide" to determine the creative tone.
2. **Saved a new note** titled "Creative Brief: Stormlit Apartment Scene" containing the production-useful brief.
